mnemonics.title: Transaction vs Call Messages
mnemonics.content: TRANSACTION: Transfer value, CALL: Invoke function

mnemonics.title: Message Execution
mnemonics.content: EVM executes code, Gas allocated, Message data as input

mnemonics.title: Message Failure
mnemonics.content: Insufficient gas, Message fails, Sender loses gas

mnemonics.title: Sending Messages
mnemonics.content: eth_sendTransaction, Recipient contract address, String payload, Sufficient gas
